headline: UAE port targeted after Trump says US forces 'obliterated' military targets on Iran's Kharg Island
description: Iran's Kharg Island is home to the main terminal that handles the country's oil exports.

headline: Why is Kharg Island, Iran's key oil export hub, so important?
description: Tehran threatened to 'destroy and turn into a pile of ashes' US energy and oil infrastructure in the region after US strikes on the key island on Friday.

headline: Zelensky and European leaders warn the US against easing sanctions on Russia
description: During a visit to Paris, the Ukrainian president criticized the partial lifting of sanctions on Russian oil. The measure, decided by the US administration in response to soaring prices caused by the war in Iran, strengthens Moscow's position in Ukraine.

headline: Jürgen Habermas, influential German philosopher, dies at 96
description: The German philosopher died on Saturday March 14, 2026, at the age of 96 in Starnberg, a spokesperson for the Suhrkamp publishing house said.

headline: How a billiard hall in Paris's Belleville neighborhood became a symbol of gentrification
description: Every evening, a new crowd of young creatives packs M8, a billiards hall with six tables located in Paris's 19th arrondissement. As those working in the luxury industry started coming, the venue's original regulars gradually faded away.

description: Considered by the authorities in his country to be one of the most important cocaine traffickers in Europe, Flor Bressers, a Belgian with an atypical profile, fond of luxury and architect of sprawling networks, is at the center of a legal saga.

headline: Jeffrey Epstein's Parisian lives
description: Over 18 years, the extremely kitsch property at 22 Avenue Foch served Epstein as a European office, a salon for artists and scientists and, above all, one of the places where he committed his sexual crimes.

headline: Benjamin Netanyahu, a prime minister without checks and balances
description: The strikes in Iran have further reduced the political space for opposition in Israel, even as concerns mount over a possible ground offensive in Lebanon. Today, only Donald Trump seems capable of influencing the Israeli leader.
